phrases.intent_en: Ask where boat rental deposit is paid
phrases.cultural_note: German service points expect customers to ask directly at counters; no small talk needed.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Promenade path leads north
phrases.text_local: Wohin führt die Promenade Richtung Norden?
phrases.cultural_note: Promenades in tourist lakeside towns often lead toward the village center or harbor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where parking meter L547 is located
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Parkschein für L547?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking meters in German-speaking regions are often clustered along main access roads near entry points.

likely_response.local: Die Parkuhr steht am Weg zum See.
likely_response.translation_en: The parking meter is on the path to the lake.

responses.english: The parking meter is on the path to the lake.
responses.local: Die Parkuhr steht am Weg zum See.
